allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Update ClaimRegisterTest to match refactored controller API

Tests were using old field names \(debit/credit/status\) instead of the
new transaction_type/amount fields. Also fixed JournalEntry factory
setup and removed obsolete cheque validation test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(sed -i '' -e 's/class="text-right font-mono text-gray-700"/class="text-right font-mono"/g' -e 's/class="text-right font-mono text-blue-700"/class="text-right font-mono"/g' -e 's/class="text-right font-mono text-green-700"/class="text-right font-mono"/g' -e 's/class="text-right font-mono font-bold {{ \\$row->closing_balance > 0 ? '\\''text-orange-700'\\'' : '\\''text-green-700'\\'' }}"/class="text-right font-mono font-bold"/g' -e 's/class="text-right font-mono px-2 py-1 text-gray-700"/class="text-right font-mono px-2 py-1"/g' -e 's/class="text-right font-mono px-2 py-1 text-blue-700"/class="text-right font-mono px-2 py-1"/g' -e 's/class="text-right font-mono px-2 py-1 text-green-700"/class="text-right font-mono px-2 py-1"/g' -e 's/class="text-right font-mono px-2 py-1 text-orange-700"/class="text-right font-mono px-2 py-1"/g' resources/views/reports/supplier-ledger/index.blade.php resources/views/reports/supplier-ledger/salesmen.blade.php resources/views/reports/supplier-ledger/customers.blade.php)
